technique_description: 方框呼吸法採用簡單的4-4-4-4模式－吸氣、屏息、吐氣、屏息－每個動作持續四秒鐘。它能啟動副交感神經系統，降低壓力，使你恢復平靜專注的狀態。
session_complete_msg: 呼吸練習完成得很好。花點時間感受一下你的身體感覺——更輕盈、更穩定、更放鬆。

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

app_complete_message: 您已完成箱式呼吸練習。您應該會感覺更加平衡和平靜。
app_description: Box breathing uses a simple 4-4-4-4 pattern — inhale, hold, exhale, hold — each for four seconds. It activates your parasympathetic nervous system, lowering stress and bringing you back to a calm, focused state.
instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
